title: triticum involutum
intro: Triticum involutum, also known as the involute wheat grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the wheat family and is native to parts of Asia and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Triticum involutum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Triticum involutum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
